headline: Banks Get the Go-Ahead to Hike Dividends. Where the Best Yields Are.
summary: Banks have been going on a dividend spree after sailing through the Federal Reserve’s latest stress test.  Major banks rushed to announce increased dividends and buyback programs after acing the Fed’s latest test of their financial health.  JPMorgan Chase Morgan Stanley Citigroup  and  Goldman Sachs  all announced divided increases, while JPMorgan Chase and Morgan Stanley also detailed new buyback initiatives.

headline: US Bancorp Declares SCB & Plans Dividend Hike After 2026 Stress Test

headline: Find Out Why UBS Lowered Its Price Target On LyondellBasell (LYB) From $82 To $73
summary: With 59 hedge funds holding bullish positions and analysts seeing 34.14% upside potential, LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) ranks among the top stocks to buy for financial stability. The stock has drawn analyst attention recently, with views split on how long elevated petrochemical pricing can hold up. headline: Wells Fargo Sees Caterpillar (CAT) Benefiting From Data Center and Energy Demand
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is included among the Top 10 Blue Chip Stocks with Growing Dividends. On June 23, Wells Fargo raised its price recommendation on Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) to $1,155 from $1,050. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. In a research note, the firm said its checks across the data center and oil […]
